name: Purchase Full Implementation
description: Complete Purchase implementation workflow: analyze suppliers, configure products and pricelists, set up procurement, validate receipt/bill flow, and deploy.

steps.name: Analyze Procurement Requirements
steps.description: Identify products to purchase, vendors, lead times, currencies, and approval rules

steps.name: Configure Vendors & Supplier Info
steps.description: Create vendor partners, payment terms, and product supplierinfo records

steps.name: Setup Procurement & Routes
steps.description: Configure buy routes, reordering rules, MTO, dropshipping, and landed cost rules

steps.name: Design Approval Workflow
steps.description: Define PO approval thresholds, multi-level sign-offs, and team assignments

steps.name: Pilot Purchase-to-Pay Flow
steps.description: Run a pilot RFQ → PO → receipt → vendor bill → payment and validate three-way matching

steps.name: Train Buyers & Warehouse Users
steps.description: Train buyers on RFQ/PO, warehouse staff on receipts, and accountants on vendor bills
